name: Kitchen Gadget Demo
description: Kitchen gadget demonstration and cooking result
environment_block: modern kitchen setting with counter space, visible kitchen tools and ingredients, realistic home kitchen environment, warm cooking atmosphere
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with kitchen counter shots, natural hand movement showing kitchen tools, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator demonstrates kitchen gadget in action, shows preparation process and final result, natural satisfaction with gadget performance, pauses to explain benefits to camera
performance_block: enthusiastic cooking energy, genuine curiosity and excitement, natural eye contact with camera during explanations, authentic reactions to cooking results
platform_block: realistic TikTok kitchen content style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic cooking enthusiast vibe, satisfying gadget demonstrations
lighting_block: warm kitchen lighting or natural daylight from windows, soft shadows, realistic kitchen environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure on bright surfaces
motion_block: natural hand movements when using kitchen gadgets, smooth product demonstrations, authentic satisfaction reactions with cooking results
audio_block: subtle kitchen sounds, gadget operation sounds, cooking environment ambience, authentic enthusiastic speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury cooking show aesthetic, no overly polished production
